step_rationale: CD51 on endothelial microparticles; endothelial activation and damage marker.
mechanism: CD51+ endothelial microparticles circulate during acute MI, reflecting endothelial cell activation, injury, and shedding of membrane fragments during coronary thrombosis.

references.title: Circulating endothelial microparticles in patients with acute myocardial infarction.
High levels of circulating endothelial microparticles in patients with acute coronary syndromes.
